[title-triangle]全球十一支参赛队伍及种子顺位确定

英雄联盟2026季中冠军赛(MSI)的11支参赛队伍及种子顺位已全部确定｡五个主要赛区的一号种子队伍分别为:LPL赛区的BLG､LCK赛区的HLE､LEC赛区的G2､LCS赛区的LYON以及LCP赛区的TSW｡巴西CBLOL赛区的FURIA也作为一号种子参赛｡ https://so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_9246a30b39a42765 #7 2026MSI (2026-06-28) 哔哩哔哩(bilibili)直播,在这里看见最年轻的生活方式,学习､游戏､电竞､宅舞､唱见､绘画､美食等等应有尽有,快来捕捉你最喜欢的up主最真实的一面吧! https://live.bilibili.com/7734200 #8 LOL官推:Zeus与Gumayusi击败曾经的队友,再次参加MSI (2026-06-12) source: 腾讯网 LOL赛事官推发文:从2022到2026,时隔四年,Zeus与Gumayusi击败曾经并肩作战的队友,再次参加在韩国举办的MSI｡(2022和2026的MSI都是在韩国举办) https://new.qq.com/rain/a/20260612A091YO00 #9 MSI数据前瞻:Faker封神榜,老将撑起天 (2026-06-18) source: 企鹅号

虽然2026年《英雄联盟》季中冠军赛要等到6月28日才正式开赛,但欧洲队伍G2和KC的选手们已经提前抵达韩国展开集训,我们也顺利找到了他们在韩服的训练账号｡本届MSI采用双败淘汰制,而拳头游戏本周还公布了决赛阶段的一项新规则:从胜者组晋级的队伍,将同时拥有第一局比赛的红蓝方选边权和BP优先权｡在2026赛季的职业赛事中,这两个选择权原本是分开的,但MSI的胜者组队伍将重新获得这一优势｡ https://so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_7346a33c8a338752 #10 英雄联盟msi官网2026官网官方版官方版-英雄联盟msi官网2026官网官方版安装2026最新版V7.34.93 安卓版 -2265安卓网 (2026-06-14) source: 淘豆网 63934 次下载 官方 ; 年满18周岁 下载安装 版本:V5.72.6 ;大小:123.80MB 开发商:英雄联盟msi官网2026官网官方版|信息科技有限公司 隐私政策 隐私权限 小编点评 📞英雄联盟msi官网2026官网官方版📞 ❥第一步:访问英雄联盟msi官网2026官网官方版官网 首先,打开您的浏览器,输入英雄联盟msi官网2026官网官方版的官方网址(https://www. https://www.taodocs.com/p-770707653.html

rounds.text:
<think>Interesting findings so far:
1. MSI 2026 uses patch 16.13 (based on LoLalytics)
2. DCG was ranked 11th (lowest) in pre-tournament power rankings, considered a "dark horse" team from LCP/PCS
3. TLAW is LCS's Team Liquid with mostly new roster (Morgan top, Josedeodo jungle, Quid mid, Yeon/CoreJJ bot)
4. TLAW leads series 1-0 (this is game 2)
5. DCG was swept by KC earlier (0-3 in their first series)

Wait, I need to reconsider. The series score shows TLAW leads 1-0. But the search shows TLAW is "blue" in this context. Let me re-read the data:

- "blue": "Team Liquid Alienware" - This is TLAW, blue side
- "red": "Deep Cross Gaming" - This is DCG, red side
- Series score: blue 1, red 0 → TLAW leads 1-0

OK so TLAW is blue and won game 1. Now let me analyze the BP for game 2.

TLAW (Blue) picks:
- Top: Twisted Fate (Morgan)
- Jungle: Pantheon (Josedeodo)
- Mid: Ryze (Quid)
- ADC: Ziggs (Yeon)
- Support: Rell (CoreJJ)

DCG (Red) picks:
- Top: Gnar (Flauren)
- Jungle: Olaf (Pop9)
- Mid: Taliyah (HongSuo)
- ADC: Senna (Feng)
- Support: Nautilus (ShiauC)

Let me analyze this BP:

**Blue (TLAW) Composition:**
- This is a very AP-heavy composition with FOUR magic damage threats (TF, Pantheon, Ryze, Ziggs) plus Rell (mostly physical but some AP scaling)
- Ziggs is unusual as an ADC but provides massive poke/siege
- TF top is a flex/troll pick or specific counter - it's actually decent into certain matchups
- Pantheon jungle is strong early ganker
- Ryze is a mid-to-late game scaling battlemage with strong teamfight utility
- Rell provides engage/disengage
- This comp has decent early game (Pantheon ganks, TF ult flanks) but scales very well into mid-late with Ryze and Ziggs poke

**Red (DCG) Composition:**
- More standard composition: Gnar top, Olaf jungle (power farmer early), Taliyah mid (roaming/teamfight ult), Senna ADC (scaling support-like carry), Nautilus support (engage)
- This comp has stronger mid-game teamfight with Taliyah ult + Gnar ult + Nautilus ult
- Olaf is a strong duelist/fighter jungler who can invade and counter-jungle

**Key Matchups:**
- Twisted Fate (top) vs Gnar: TF has range advantage, can split push and use ult to flank. Gnar is a tank with kitable kit.
- Pantheon vs Olaf: This is a critical jungle matchup. Pantheon has stronger early ganks with point-and-click stun. Olaf has stronger dueling and faster clear.
- Ryze vs Taliyah: Both are control mages. Taliyah has stronger roam/teamfight ult. Ryze has stronger 1v1 and scaling.
- Ziggs vs Senna: Ziggs has strong waveclear and poke. Senna is more about scaling autos. Ziggs is unusual - usually Ziggs is a mid pick.
- Rell vs Nautilus: Both engage supports. Nautilus has hook, Rell has AoE engage/disengage.

**Powerspikes & Win Conditions:**
- Blue wants to snowball early with Pantheon ganks + TF teleports, get to mid-late with Ryze/Ziggs scaling
- Red wants to survive early and scale into mid-game with Taliyah/Olaf power, team fight with R-ult combos (Taliyah wall + Gnar ult)

**Concerns for Blue:**
- All AP comp (4-5 magic damage) is very vulnerable to magic resist stacking
- Ziggs ADC lacks the consistent DPS of a traditional marksman
- TF top is risky if he gets behind - Gnar can tank and split
- Ryze needs time to scale

**Concerns for Red:**
- Olaf needs to invade and pressure Pantheon, but Pantheon can stun-lock him in fights
- Senna is weaker early; if Taliyah/HongSuo falls behind, midgame is rough
- DCG is a weaker team overall (ranked 11th)

**Overall Assessment:**
- TLAW has stronger fundamentals (CoreJJ/Yeon bot lane, even if Morgan/Quid are new)
- TLAW leads 1-0, has momentum
- DCG is the weakest team at MSI (ranked 11th)
- TLAW's comp is AP-heavy but has good scaling and teamfight
- DCG's comp has better mid-game teamfight but weaker scaling

I think TLAW (blue) is favored here. AP-heavy comp is risky but they have the better players and momentum. The Ziggs/Ryze double-AP carry late game is very hard to deal with if Pantheon/TF can enable them.

I'll predict:
- TLAW (blue) win: ~65%
- DCG (red) win: ~35%
- Duration: ~33 minutes (mid-range, both comps scale)
- Kills: TLAW 17, DCG 12 = 29 total

Let me finalize this analysis.</think>

[web_search 'Ziggs ADC bot lane competitive 2026 viability AP bot meta' — 10 results] #1 困难样本挖掘(Online Hard Sample Mining)-CSDN专栏 (2026-06-04) 一､分类与检测 分类和检测是计算机视觉里面两个非常重要的任务,虽然两个任务的目标并不完全相同,但是本质上检测是在分类问题上的一次推广,即检测是在整个个图像上做的局部分类并且标记该局部分类的位置,那么可以说:检测=搜索+分类,所以某种意义上来说检测可以归约为分类问题[4] 现在的因为深度网络(尤其是CNN)的流行,很多重要的物体检测算法都是基于CNN,如YOLO,SSD,Faster https://download.csdn.net/blog/column/5762069/117049593 #2 2026 高性价比随身 WiFi 全场景实测 (2026-06-02) source: 企鹅号

如今流量焦虑､校园网限速､租房宽带安装麻烦､户外无网可用已经成为多数人的日常痛点｡手机流量不够用､宽带安装周期长､公共网络不安全,让随身 WiFi 成为刚需设备｡但市场上产品鱼龙混杂,虚标流量､隐形消费､信号不稳､售后无保障等问题层出不穷,普通用户很难分辨优劣｡

本次测评耗时 30 https://so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_8846a1dae3f03352 #3 Article Metrics - Integrative structure determination reveals functional global flexibility for an ultra-multimodular arabinanase Communications (2026-05-31) source: Nature Integrative structure determination reveals functional global flexibility for an ultra-multimodular arabinanase Access & Citations Article Accesses Citations Citation counts are provided by https://www.nature.com/articles/s42003-022-03054-z/metrics #4 南开大学提出深度霍夫变换:语义线检测新方法-CSDN专栏 (2026-06-04) Deep Hough Transform for Semantic Line Detection 主页:https://mmcheng.net/dhtline/ 论文:http://mftp.mmcheng.net/Papers/21PAMI-DHT-line.pdf 代码:https://github.com/Hanqer/deep-hough-transform https://download.csdn.net/blog/column/5762069/116860839 #5 互联网_网易科技频道 (2026-06-23) source: 网易 品牌大咖说|滴露､李维斯接连翻车:当“冒犯” sina qqZone renren ydCloud 0 中新经纬 2026-06-23 19:46:38 字节掀桌!豆包2.1成本暴砍80%,编程追平Claude sina qqZone renren ydCloud 0 智东西 WPS,被骂惨了 sina qqZone renren ydCloud 0 中国新闻周刊 2026-06-23 https://tech.163.com/internet/ #6 2026星际火狐网络工具优选:UU与盒方案 (2026-06-24) source: 企鹅号

作为一款快节奏的飞行射击名作,《星际火狐》对操作的即时反馈和网络的连续稳定性要求颇高｡尤其在主机端体验时,商店无法访问､龟速下载､联机对战中的卡顿或高时延等状况,往往会严重扰乱战斗节奏｡进入2026年,主机玩家对网络品质的期待进一步提升,甄选一款契合的星际火狐网络优化工具,已成为优化游玩感受的关键步骤｡

如今随身 WiFi 已经成为校园宿舍､租房居家､商务出差､户外旅行､直播办公等场景里的刚需上网设备,但市场上虚标流量､隐形扣费､信号不稳､资质不全､售后无保障等问题频发,让很多用户花钱买糟心｡真正能被称作口碑最好的随身 wifi 品牌,一定是经过海量真实用户长期检验､网速稳定､套餐透明､续航可靠､资质齐全､售后完善的优质品牌｡

本次测评耗时 45 天,收集全网超 5 https://so.html5.qq.com/page/real/search_news?docid=70000021_0856a291e6c43552

rounds.text:
<think>I have enough information now. Let me synthesize the analysis:

**Key context gathered:**
- MSI 2026 is on patch 16.13
- DCG (Deep Cross Gaming) is ranked 11th (last) among the 11 MSI teams, from LCP (formerly PCS)
- DCG has older veterans like Flauren with young talent, just got into MSI by beating GAM 3-2 in losers bracket
- DCG got swept by KC earlier in their first MSI series
- TLAW (Team Liquid Alienware) rebuilt roster: kept Yeon/CoreJJ bot lane, signed Morgan (ex-BRO top), Josedeodo (Argentine jungler), Quid (Korean mid who helped 100T beat BLG)
- TLAW leads this series 1-0 (won game 1)
- TLAW is from LCS, considered a mid-tier team

**BP Analysis (Game 2):**

Blue (TLAW):
- Top: Twisted Fate (Morgan) - AP split pusher with teleport flank potential
- Jungle: Pantheon (Josedeodo) - Strong early ganker, point-and-click stun
- Mid: Ryze (Quid) - Scaling battlemage with strong teamfight
- ADC: Ziggs (Yeon) - AP siege/poke marksman
- Support: Rell (CoreJJ) - Engage/disengage tank support

Red (DCG):
- Top: Gnar (Flauren) - Tank/bruiser with kitable kit
- Jungle: Olaf (Pop9) - Power farmer, strong duelist
- Mid: Taliyah (HongSuo) - Control mage with teamfight ult
- ADC: Senna (Feng) - Scaling support-carry hybrid
- Support: Nautilus (ShiauC) - Hook engage tank

**Matchup analysis:**

1. **TF vs Gnar (Top)**: TF has range advantage but Gnar is tanky. TF needs to abuse range and use ult for flanks/teleports. Slight edge to TF in 1v1, but Gnar scales better and provides more frontline.

2. **Pantheon vs Olaf (Jungle)**: Critical matchup. Pantheon has stronger early ganks and counter-jungle presence with point-click stun. Olaf has stronger 1v1 and faster clear. Pantheon should win the early game; Olaf wins if he survives and scales.

3. **Ryze vs Taliyah (Mid)**: Both control mages. Taliyah has stronger roam and teamfight ult. Ryze has better scaling and 1v1. Skill matchup; depends on player.

4. **Ziggs vs Senna (Bot)**: Unusual pick. Ziggs has range/poke/waveclear advantage but Senna scales better with souls. Ziggs needs to snowball lane; Senna wins if it goes long.

5. **Rell vs Nautilus (Sup)**: Both engage tanks. Rell has more follow-up CC; Nautilus has hook. Slight edge to Rell in teamfight combo, Nautilus in pick.

**Key observations:**
- TLAW (blue) has FOUR magic damage dealers (TF, Pantheon, Ryze, Ziggs) - this is an extreme AP-heavy comp. Vulnerable to MR stacking but strong siege/poke
- DCG (red) has more standard mixed damage comp with better front-to-back teamfight
- TLAW's comp has stronger 1-9 (early) with Pantheon ganks + TF teleports
- TLAW's comp also has strong scaling with Ryze/Ziggs
- DCG's comp has stronger mid-game teamfight with Taliyah/Gnar/Nautilus ults
- DCG's comp relies on Olaf scaling, which can be punished by Pantheon

**Win conditions:**
- TLAW: Snowball early with Pantheon/TF ganks → siege with Ziggs poke → outscale with Ryze
- DCG: Survive early, win mid-game teamfights with combo ults, hope Olaf can 1v9

**Prediction:**
- TLAW leads series 1-0, has stronger roster fundamentals (CoreJJ veteran, Yeon stable, Quid who beat BLG)
- DCG is the weakest team at MSI (ranked 11th)
- TLAW's comp is AP-heavy but has good scaling and Pantheon can control Olaf
- DCG has the Senna scaling win condition but needs to survive

I'll favor TLAW (blue) at ~62-65%. AP-heavy comp is risky but TLAW has better players and the comp has clear path to victory.

For game length: ~32-34 minutes. Both comps have decent scaling; Ziggs siege is strong so the game likely goes long enough for Ryze to come online.

Kills: TLAW has more aggressive early comp, so they should get more kills. ~16-17 vs 11-12, total 27-29.

Let me finalize:
- Win prob: blue 0.63, red 0.37
- Winner: blue (TLAW)
- Duration: 33.5 min
- Kills: blue 16, red 12, total 28

Key drafted champions:
- Pantheon (blue, jun): Early gank engine to shut down Olaf and snowball
- Ziggs (blue, adc): AP siege carry, enables objective control
- Taliyah (red, mid): Teamfight engine with ult, needs to win mid-game
- Olaf (red, jun): Needs to survive Pantheon pressure and scale

Let me output the JSON now.</think>

```json
{
  "reasoning": {
    "overall": "本局看好蓝色方 TLAW（Team Liquid Alienware）取胜。TLAW 系列赛已 1-0 领先且对面 DCG 是 MSI 11 支参赛队伍中赛前实力榜第 11 名（最弱），TLAW 阵容基本面（CoreJJ 老将指挥 + Quid 曾率 100T 击败 BLG 的经验 + Yeon 稳定输出）远胜 DCG。BP 层面 TLAW 摆出 4 AP 的极端爆发/推进体系，配合 Pantheon 早期节奏与 Twisted Fate 边线/全图支援，能在上半区牢牢压制 DCG 的 Olaf–Taliyah 组合。",
    "draft_analysis": "蓝色方 TLAW 的阵容是当前版本少见的极端多 AP 推进流：上单 Twisted Fate 提供分推 + 全图传送支援，打野 Pantheon 提供前期强点控节奏，中单 Ryze 是后期团战持续输出与控制核心，ADC Ziggs 取代传统射手提供超远距离消耗与推塔节奏，辅助 Rell 提供先手开团与保护反打。这套阵容前 15 分钟靠 Pantheon 点控 gank 与 TF 全图支援打出节奏差，20–30 分钟靠 Ziggs 长手消耗推进，30 分钟后 Ryze 接管的曲线非常清晰，缺点是 4 个魔法伤害容易被堆魔抗针对、缺乏常规射手持续 DPS、且一旦前期被反压没有稳定翻盘点。\n\n红色方 DCG 的阵容更接近标准的中期团战组合：上单 Gnar 提供前排坦克与大招团控，打野 Olaf 负责前期入侵与中后期单带收割，中单 Taliyah 的墙大招是团战分割地形的核心，ADC Senna 提供后期无限成长输出，辅助 Nautilus 提供钩子先手与连环控制。DCG 阵容优点是前排充足、控制链完整、Senna 后期满级后伤害恐怖；缺点是前期对线阶段极怕 Pantheon + TF 联动、Senna 缺乏自保容易成为 TF 黄牌/潘森跳大的目标、且 HongSuo 的 Taliyah 若在 BP 余量不大的情况下与 Quid 的 Ryze 拼补刀未必占优。",
    "tempo_wincon": "节奏层面，TLAW 是这局毫无疑问的前期主动方：Josedeodo 的 Pantheon 必须在 6/8/10 分钟节点围绕上路 Morgan 的 TF 与中路 Quid 的 Ryze 做联动，一旦在上半区打开局面，TF 的传送和黄牌可以快速滚起雪球；Ziggs 的推线让 Yeon 不至于在下路崩盘，反而能用超远 Q 持续压低 Senna 血线。DCG 的致胜条件只能是 Pop9 的 Olaf 顶住前期入侵压力、让 HongSuo 的 Taliyah 用墙分割战场 + Gnar/Nautilus 大招形成连环控制秒杀 TLAW 的脆皮中射，并在中段（20–28 分钟）抢下小龙和男爵团奠定胜势，否则拖到 30 分钟以后 Ryze + Ziggs 双核接管，DCG 阵容将完全没有翻盘空间。综合选手差距、系列赛气势与 BP 强势期分布，TLAW 在 30 分钟左右拿下第二局的概率最大。"
  },
  "win_prob": { "blue": 0.63, "red": 0.37 },
  "predicted_winner": "blue",
  "expected_duration_min": 33.5,

  "total_kills": 28,
  "key_drafted_champions": [

    { "champion": "Twisted Fate", "team": "blue", "role": "top", "impact": "全图传送 + 黄牌单点硬控，提供边线分推与绕后支援双重功能，是这套 4AP 体系里的功能轴" },
    { "champion": "Ryze", "team": "blue", "role": "mid", "impact": "后期团战持续输出与 EW 群体控制，是 TLAW 拖入 30 分钟后接管比赛的核心" },
    { "champion": "Taliyah", "team": "blue", "role": "jun", "impact": "更正：红色方核心大招墙的施放，决定 DCG 能否在中期团战分割战场，是 DCG 仅有的翻盘支点之一" },
    { "champion": "Senna", "team": "red", "role": "adc", "impact": "后期无限成长型射手，DCG 若能将比赛拖到 35 分钟以后，Feng 的 Senna 是唯一能突破 TLAW 多 AP 阵的物理持续伤害来源" }
```
